constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::FormattedText. The anchor type can be one of the following values: ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_CENTER
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::FormattedText. The anchor type can be one of the following values: ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_CENTER

throws.when: if the passed in string is empty

methods.name: new_from_file
methods.signature: new_from_file(path, bounds) => Layout::FormattedText | new_from_file(path, anchor_point, anchor_type) => Layout::FormattedText
methods.summary: The new_from_file method creates a new Layout::FormattedText from a text file.
methods.remarks: The new_from_file method creates a new Layout::FormattedText from a text file. The anchor type can be one of the following values: ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_LEFT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_RIGHT ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_CENTER_CENTER ANCHOR_TYPE_BOTTOM_CENTER Layout::FormattedText::ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_LEFT)

throws.when: if the passed in string is empty
if path does not refer to a valid file

methods.name: append_plain_text
methods.summary: Note: This method does not support more than two different style runs in a single text string.
methods.remarks: Note: This method does not support more than two different style runs in a single text string. The #append_plain_text method appends new text with a given style to the end of the existing plain text of the Layout::FormattedText.

throws.when: if the Layout::FormattedText is on a locked Layer

methods.name: apply_style
methods.summary: The #apply_style method sets the Style for the text starting at the given character index, and running for the given number of characters.
methods.remarks: The #apply_style method sets the Style for the text starting at the given character index, and running for the given number of characters.

throws.when: if index is out of range
if length is not greater than zero
if the range specified by index and length is not valid for this Layout::FormattedText
if the Layout::FormattedText is on a locked Layer

methods.name: display_text
methods.summary: Note: Passing an invalid Page will prevent an auto-text tag from being substituted with its display representation.
methods.remarks: Note: Passing an invalid Page will prevent an auto-text tag from being substituted with its display representation. The #display_text method returns the display text representation of the Layout::FormattedText. Layout::FormattedText::ANCHOR_TYPE_TOP_LEFT) doc.add_entity(text, doc.layers.first, doc.pages.first) text = text.display_text(doc.pages.first)

params.name: page
params.doc: The Page to use to convert an auto-text tag to display text

throws.when: if page is not in the same Document as the Layout::FormattedText

methods.name: style
methods.summary: The #style method returns a Style for the text starting at the given character index, and running for the given length.
methods.remarks: The #style method returns a Style for the text starting at the given character index, and running for the given length.

throws.when: if index is out of range
if length is not greater than zero
if the range specified by index and length is not valid for this Layout::FormattedText

properties.name: grow_mode
properties.summary: The #grow_mode method returns the mode for how the Layout::FormattedText sizes itself.
properties.remarks: The #grow_mode method returns the mode for how the Layout::FormattedText sizes itself. The grow mode can be one of the following values: Layout::FormattedText::GROW_MODE_BOUNDED Layout::FormattedText::GROW_MODE_UNBOUNDED

properties.name: plain_text
properties.summary: The #plain_text method returns the plain text representation of the Layout::FormattedText.
properties.remarks: The #plain_text method returns the plain text representation of the Layout::FormattedText.

properties.name: rtf
properties.summary: Note: Passing an invalid Page will prevent an auto-text tag from being substituted with its display representation.
properties.remarks: Note: Passing an invalid Page will prevent an auto-text tag from being substituted with its display representation. The #rtf method returns the raw RTF representation of the Layout::FormattedText.
